source:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Flame, Coins, Zap, BookOpen, MessageSquare, BookMarked, Bot, CheckCircle2, Trophy, Sparkles, BarChart3, Swords, Target, Globe, Crown, ArrowRight, PlayCircle, Ban } from 'lucide-react'; import { t } from '../i18n'; import { Capacitor } from '@capacitor/core'; import { showRewardedInterstitialAd, grantAdFreePass } from '../admob'; interface HomeScreenProps { settings: any; setScreen: (s: string) => void; userPoints: number; setUserPoints: React.Dispatch>; streak: number; streakMax: number; todayDone: boolean; userInfo: any; currentLevel: number; equippedSkin: string; isPremium?: boolean; setActiveStudyLevel: (idx: number) => void; setAiReportMode: (mode: 'VOCAB' | 'CONVERSATION') => void; } export const HomeScreen: React.FC = ({ settings, setScreen, userPoints, setUserPoints: _setUserPoints, streak, streakMax, todayDone, userInfo, currentLevel, equippedSkin, isPremium = false, setActiveStudyLevel, setAiReportMode }) => { const lang = settings.lang || 'ko'; const [isRolling, setIsRolling] = useState(false); const collectedWords = 20; const unmemorizedWords = 0; const skins: Record = { default: { emoji: '?맋' }, ninja: { emoji: '?Ⅷ' }, wizard: { emoji: '?쭥?띯셽截?, special: 'animate-float' }, king: { emoji: '?몣', special: 'animate-float' }, dragon: { emoji: '?릧', special: 'animate-float premium-shine' }, alien: { emoji: '?뫝', special: 'animate-pulse' }, robot: { emoji: '?쨼', special: 'animate-pulse' }, vampire: { emoji: '?쭧', special: 'animate-float' }, hero: { emoji: '?┯?띯셽截?, special: 'animate-float' }, ghost: { emoji: '?뫛', special: 'animate-float opacity-80' }, tiger: { emoji: '?맦', special: 'animate-pulse' }, unicorn: { emoji: '?쫫', special: 'animate-float premium-shine' }, devil: { emoji: '?삁', special: 'animate-float' }, angel: { emoji: '?삀', special: 'animate-float premium-shine' }, cat: { emoji: '?맩' }, dog: { emoji: '?맯' } }; const skinData = skins[equippedSkin] || skins.default; return (

VocaQuest

v1.8.5
{streak}
{userPoints.toLocaleString()}

{todayDone ? t(lang, 'streak_active', { n: streak }) : t(lang, 'streak_warning', { n: streak })}

{t(lang, 'streak_max_record', { n: streakMax })}
{skinData.emoji}
{isPremium && (
)}
LV {Math.max(0, currentLevel - 1)}

{userInfo?.nickname || t(lang, 'guest')}

{t(lang, 'home_stats_label', { collected: collectedWords, weak: unmemorizedWords })}

{/* Monetization / Reward Quick Actions */} {Capacitor.isNativePlatform() && !isPremium && (
)} {/* Moved Community Banner to top */} {/* Live Chat Banner */}
); };
